description: src/config.rs deserializes .balls/config.json without post-parse sanity checks. id_length = 0 causes infinite-loop id generation, huge values waste memory, worktree_dir = '..' or '/tmp/evil' escapes the repo. Fix: on load, clamp id_length to [4, 32] with a warning on clamp; reject worktree_dir values containing '..' or starting with '/'. Tests for each rejection path.
title: Config validation: clamp id_length + reject escaping worktree_dir
